name: 36" Greenery Centerpiece with Brass Candle Holder - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Amplify the beauty of your dining table with this Greenery Centerpiece with Brass Candle Holder from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. The unlit centerpiece is embellished with lush cedar greenery and brass candle holders to create a unique and festive tablescape. These decorative centerpiece is suitable for holding taper candles and can be placed on your entryway console or dining table for a warm, soft glow.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
